Name: Polar Metal
Desc4: Increase the DMG of <color=#ffffff>Basic Attack</color> and <color=#ffffff>Dash Attack</color> by 20%. When any squad member inflicts <color=#98eff0>Freeze</color> or <color=#98eff0>Shatter</color>, this effect increases by an additional 20% for 12s.
Story: A Drive Disc burned with specialized Ether technology offering personalized attribute amplification to the user.
